metadata.description: docs-creator + component-creator plugins for Claude Code — documentation authoring and Figma-to-code component creation.

plugins.name: docs-creator
plugins.description: Authoring, validation, and drift-detection for .claude/ docs. Schema 1.4 (M13 — registry as single source of truth): `component-registry.json` is canonical per-component catalog; `reference-component-inventory.md` DROPPED; new `--migrate-inventory-to-registry` flag for 1.3 → 1.4 migration. Schema 1.3 (M11 closed): all 7 Wave 2 subagents two-stream output (slim JSON + Markdown Content section with ### → routing); canonical multi-root filename convention; `--rebuild-schema` flag for 1.2 → 1.3 migration; top-level `drift` block. Auto-emits version banner + update-available indicator. Ships analyze-frontend, create-frontend-docs, update-frontend-docs, analyze-api-contracts, init-project, update-docs, validate-claude-docs, status, menu and more.

plugins.name: component-creator
plugins.description: Figma-to-code component creation with SSIM visual verification, Code Connect integration, and component registry. M10 Phase 4 (Registry Management) shipped — 3 lifecycle skills: /sync-registry (Figma Code Connect refresh), /validate-registry (structural audit + --fix), /update-registry (single-entry rename/move + uses[] cascade). Auto-emits version banner + update-available indicator on every slash-command invocation via UserPromptSubmit hook.
